classification.internship_note: LCA-style data is often highly imbalanced (many Certified, few Denied). We use class_weight='balanced' and report macro-F1, balanced accuracy, average precision (PR-AUC), and per-class recall — not accuracy alone.
classification.model_selection_metric: f1_macro (higher is better across both classes)

logistic_balanced.classification_report:

   Certified       0.78      0.72      0.75       149

    accuracy                           0.70       240
   macro avg       0.69      0.69      0.69       240
weighted avg       0.71      0.70      0.70       240
